<h3 align="center">Hi, I'm Trung Tran Duy</h3>

<p align="center">
  <strong>Fullstack Developer</strong> from <strong>Hanoi, Vietnam</strong> • <em>5+ years experience</em>
</p>

<p align="center">
  <strong>Less complexity, more impact</strong><br/>
  I'm a passionate developer who loves building things that make life easier and more enjoyable.<br/>
  From <strong>Web Applications</strong> to <strong>Full-stack Solutions</strong>, I enjoy turning complex problems into elegant solutions.
</p>
